info.title: EKS Health Checker
info.description: Checks health status of an EKS cluster including node groups, deployments, and pod restarts

get.description: Checks the health of an EKS cluster — cluster status, node group health, unhealthy or scaled-down deployments, and crashing pods. Use this when the user asks if services are running, if pods are healthy, if anything is down, or for a general system health check. Default cluster is eks-cluster and default namespace is boutique.

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: EKS cluster name to check. Defaults to eks-cluster.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Kubernetes namespace to check deployments and pods in. Defaults to boutique.
